acquisition method: The mass spectrometer was operated in the data-dependent mode to automatically switch between MS and MS/MS acquisition.
cleavage agent: The tryptic peptides were dissolved in 10 µL 0.1% formic acid/2% acetonitrile...
collision energy: for fragmentation using higher-energy collisional induced dissociation (HCD) at a target value of 105 charges, NCE 28...
fragmentation method: for fragmentation using higher-energy collisional induced dissociation (HCD) at a target value of 105 charges...
instrument: connected to a Q Exactive mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific, Bremen, Germany)...
ionization type: equipped with a nano electrospray ion source.
labeling: The proteomic analysis was performed by the Proteomic core facility of University of Oslo.
